brief_justification: Correct answer with valid causal reasoning identifying the collider structure; Deep analysis covering collider bias, explaining away, and why conditioning opens spurious paths; Some self-monitoring via the injected reasoning context suppressing correlation-causation leaps; Verification through explaining the mechanism of why Method 1 fails (collider bias); Presents the conclusion confidently but the causal structure is definitively specified so certainty is appropriate; Systematically evaluates both methods and explains precisely why Method 1 fails and Method 2 succeeds; Complete derivation from causal graph to collider identification to conditioning consequences to final answer.
